zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Montfort於1075年出生在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆時，他的父親Gilbert de Gant27歲，母親Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle25歲。他於1120年之前與Adeline de Beaumont在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1147年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Montfort于1075年出生在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆时，他的父亲Gilbert de Gant27岁，母亲Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle25岁。他于1120年之前与Adeline de Beaumont在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1147年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Montfort was born in 1075, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Gilbert de Gant, was 27 and his mother, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, was 25. He married Adeline de Beaumont before 1120, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1147, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Montfort est né en 1075, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Gant, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Adeline de Beaumont avant 1120, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1147, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Montfort 1075 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Gant 27 und seine Mutter Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle 25. Er hat vor 1120 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England Adeline de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1147 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Montfort è nato il nel 1075 nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert de Gant, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Adeline de Beaumont prima del 1120, nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1147, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Montfortが1075年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Gantは27歳，母Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risleは25歳であった。1120年以前にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターでAdeline de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1147年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Montfort(이)가 1075년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Gant(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1120년 이전 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 Adeline de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Montfort nasceu em 1075, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Gant, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeline de Beaumont antes 1120, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1147, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Montfort родился в 1075 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Gant было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeline de Beaumont перед 1120 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1147 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Montfort nació en 1075, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Gant, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Adeline de Beaumont antes de 1120, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1147, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
